name: BrushBattle
author: Poki
description: BrushBattle is an online game where your drawing skills are put to the test! When given a word, start drawing, and the first person whose drawing is recognized by the computer wins the round. Compete against opponents in Battle mode or set speed records in Practice mode. The key is to draw accurately—sometimes you don’t even need to finish your whole drawing for it to be correct. Can you win this brush battle? How to play BrushBattle? Click or tap to draw! Who created BrushBattle? BrushBattle is created by BrightSpike. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play BrushBattle for free? You can play BrushBattle for free on Poki. Can I play BrushBattle on mobile devices and desktop? BrushBattle can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play BrushBattle with my friend? Yes! BrushBattle is a single or multiplayer game so you can play with your friends!
